right_offer.title: Seagate IronWolf 6TB NAS Internal Hard Drive (3.5")
right_offer.description: Range of capacities up to 12TB. Workload rate of 180TB/year. Optimized for NAS with AgileArray, enables dual-plane balancing and RAID optimization in multi-bay environments. Actively protect your NAS with IronWolf Health Management. Rotational Vibration (RV) sensors. Always-on, always-accessible 24×7 performance. 1M hours MTBF, 3-year limited warranty.

task.policy_text: Return match only if both offers refer to the same core product and not merely a related accessory, bundle, storage variant, color variant, or neighboring model.
